eligibilityRules: the action/reason mechanics required by the post are unlocked
the post has not already appeared in the current playthrough
the player accessibility settings do not block its sensitivity tags
selectionOrder: reserve slots using the action targets
apply category, topic, sensitivity and platform caps
fall back to another eligible action bucket only when a target bucket is empty
storyPosts: Authored story posts remain fixed and are not drawn from this filler pool.
